findings: ADDRESSED/re-verified E(iii): the contextpack coverage citation added in R5 is accurate. internal/contextpack/budgeter_test.go (TestContextPackDeterministic :174) and internal/contextpack/budgeter_layout_test.go (TestContextPackFlatVsCanonicalByteIdentical :44) both exist; BuildBead is defined budgeter.go:145 and called BuildBead("bead-fixture", 2000, tokenize.Approx{}) at :188/:192. ADDRESSED/re-verified D: R9's named doctor walk seam matches an implementable reality. filepath.WalkDir(root, func...) is at internal/doctor/ownership.go:128 EXACTLY as the spec now states; manifestResolvesAny is func at :121; walkExclusions map defined :20 and consulted :141 (skips .git/.worktrees/.beads via fs.SkipDir).
